challenge: Achilles needed to standardise HR communications across its global network and move away from Excel spreadsheets. It also required a system that could automatically generate personalised employee communications in multiple languages across 17 territories.
solution: By implementing Sage People as a central data system, Achilles could put people at the heart of its business with transparent reporting and personalised communications across regions. The team automated annual salary review letters across 17 territories and 500+ employees, personalised by job role and salary.
results: Achilles achieved increased employee engagement and significantly reduced HR admin overhead. Automated salary review letters across 17 territories saved substantial time and ensured personalised communications at scale.
file_name: Achilles – Risk & Compliance Services – HCM – Improving HR visibility and control.pdf

challenge: After acquiring Docomo Digital, Bango's workforce more than doubled across 10 additional countries. Bango needed to align HR processes, automate administrative work, and improve real-time reporting across a suddenly multinational workforce.
solution: Bango chose Sage People for its strong global capabilities, automation, and robust reporting functionality. The first phase covering core HR functions was completed in just four months, with the team pushing forward an ambitious implementation plan from day one.

challenge: With 1,700 employees across 24 countries, onboarding a new hire at Daniel Wellington required multiple departments — payroll, finance, and facilities — to manually coordinate, creating delays and inefficiencies at scale.
solution: Sage People automated Daniel Wellington’s onboarding and offboarding workflows, removing the need for cross-departmental manual coordination. Employees can now be instantly onboarded and system access deactivated the moment someone leaves the company.
results:

• Complete visibility of the global workforce across 24 countries
• Global monthly payroll processes significantly reduced

challenge: As a global developer of coding and printing technologies with 3,000 employees worldwide, Domino Printing Sciences needed to centralise HR with greater automation, a higher degree of employee self-service, and consolidated data storage across its international operations.
solution: Domino implemented Sage People to unify HR processes globally, with goals of stronger automation, employee interaction and engagement, and everything stored securely in one place. The system also enabled Domino to run its own employee engagement surveys — saving time and money previously spent with third parties.
results: Domino can now track engagement scores by region or area, helping the business stay more connected with its workforce. The HR team can run surveys independently without relying on a third party, enabling more frequent employee feedback cycles.
file_name: Domino Printing Sciences – Technology – HCM – Gaining visibility across global HR operations.pdf

challenge: As a global ground transportation management platform serving more than a quarter of the Fortune 500 across multiple countries, Gett needed an HR solution that could be rapidly configured for different regions while supporting enterprise-scale operations.
solution: Sage People gave Gett the confidence to easily configure workflows and adapt content for specific regions. The team implemented leave management modules and began sharing more content through the built-in employee portal, reducing HR admin across its global offices.
results: Sage People made it quicker and easier for the Gett HR team to support internal stakeholders with real-time insights. The implementation was fast and seamless — from contract signing to go-live was a notably positive experience for the incoming CIO.

challenge: Trustpilot’s rapid international growth — including hiring 170 people in the first four months of 2021 alone — exposed the limits of its legacy HR system. solution: Sage People automated Trustpilot’s onboarding and offboarding processes, reducing time-to-onboard by over 50% and cutting offboarding time by more than half. A single global platform now provides all employees with a consistent experience regardless of region.

challenge: Urban Pubs & Bars operates multiple hospitality venues across the UK, each with large numbers of hourly and part-time workers, complex shift patterns, tronc (tips distribution), and frequent staffing changes — creating highly complex payroll requirements that needed to be managed accurately and at scale.
solution: Sage Payroll provided Urban Pubs & Bars with a centralised platform capable of handling the full complexity of hospitality pay structures across all venues, including variable hours, tronc management, and compliance with hospitality-specific pay requirements.
results: Urban Pubs & Bars can now process accurate, on-time payroll at scale across all venues, with reduced manual effort and improved compliance across its entire hospitality estate.
file_name: Urban Pubs & Bars – Hospitality – Payroll – Managing complex payroll at scale.pdf

challenge: CPM was operating with IRIS and multiple disconnected systems across locations, with no single source of truth. Frequent outages disrupted payroll and HR functions, creating GDPR compliance risks and significant admin overload.
solution: Sage People was selected for its strong HR transformation capabilities, mobile-first design, powerful automation, reliable cloud architecture, and seamless integration with CPM’s existing tech stack.
results: A unified HR and Payroll platform reduced manual intervention and improved the workforce experience. The system met GDPR requirements while reducing operational and payroll risks through clearly defined SLAs.

challenge: Silverstone faced high manual effort in HR and Payroll with heavy spreadsheet reliance, limited reporting capabilities, and multiple disjointed systems that couldn’t support the company’s 5–8% annual headcount growth.
solution: Sage People was selected for its high functionality, user-friendly design, and integration capabilities that adapt to Silverstone’s unique needs across multiple business lines including racing, karting and experiences.
results: The platform delivers a cohesive employee experience across all workforce types, with improved reporting and analytics supporting continued growth and diversification into new business lines.

challenge: Onecom’s existing Cezanne system lacked scalability for their 850-employee headcount, performed poorly for their India-based workforce, and had no HR-payroll integration — causing manual processes and poor reporting across the business.
solution: Sage People was chosen for its cross-territory scalability, flexible reporting, and integration with TeamTailor ATS for automated data flow from recruitment through to core HR, improving consistency from hire to employment.
results: The implementation enabled talent mapping and succession planning tailored to Onecom’s methodology, with improved analytics supporting strategic decisions and automated recruitment data flows reducing duplicate admin.
